purpose: Normalize relative paths and reduce source/destination Agent Skill trees into exact SHA-256 add, update, identical, and destination-only sets.
stop_condition: Stop after every regular file under the supplied source and destination Agent roots has one normalized relative path and SHA-256 result, or after one transient retry.
handoff: Return the compact diff JSON to the direct model for semantic decisions about overwrite, deletion, artifact selection, final validation, commit, and push.
